title: Styled Enchanting Tables
description: Have you ever wished that enchanting tables came in some of the ore variants, Well this datapack does exactly that!
body:
# Styled Enchanting Tables
Have you ever wished that enchanting tables came in some of the ore variants, Well this datapack does exactly that!

### What this datapack adds
- Amethyst Enchanting Table (Block)
- Gold Enchanting Table (Block)
- Netherite Enchanting Table (Block)

### Why this doesn't include the other ore materials
The other ore materials didn't feel very vanilla to me, and they didn't look that cool so I left them out.
